authors: Seth C. Lewis Rodrigo Zamith Jon Benedik A. Bunquin
raw_title: Technological Hype and AI in Journalism: Five Functions and Why They Matter
title_en: Technological Hype and AI in Journalism: Five Functions and Why They Matter
title_zh: 技术炒作与新闻业中的人工智能：五大功能及其重要性
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了人工智能在新闻业中的应用，分析了技术炒作如何影响人们对AI功能的认知，并提出了AI在新闻工作中的五个关键功能及其重要性。
plain_summary_en: This article examines the application of artificial intelligence in journalism, analyzes how technological hype affects perceptions of AI functions, and identifies five key functions of AI in journalistic work and their significance.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代新闻业的技术采纳与创新，特别关注人工智能等新兴技术如何重塑新闻生产、传播和消费模式。
research_direction_en: Investigating technology adoption and innovation in journalism in the digital age, with particular focus on how emerging technologies like artificial intelligence reshape news production, distribution, and consumption patterns.
